sourceStatus.publicationPolicy: No long SEC source text is embedded; evidence uses short digests and source URL anchors.

summaryKo.oneLine: 뉴몬트는 3분기 16억 달러의 기록적인 잉여현금흐름을 달성하고 20억 달러의 부채를 상환하며 재무 건전성을 강화했습니다.

keyPoints.text: 3분기 16억 달러의 잉여현금흐름을 기록하며 4분기 연속 10억 달러 이상의 현금 창출 능력을 입증했습니다.
성공적인 부채 공개 매수를 통해 20억 달러의 부채를 감축하고 무디스로부터 A3 신용등급 상향을 받았습니다.

businessChanges.text: 가나의 Ahafo North 프로젝트에서 상업 생산을 개시하여 향후 13년간 금 생산량을 추가할 예정입니다.
자산 매각 및 지분 처분을 통해 2025년 누적 35억 달러의 순현금 유입을 확보했습니다.

financialHighlights.text: 3분기 순이익 18억 달러, 조정 순이익 19억 달러(주당 1.71달러), 조정 EBITDA 33억 달러를 기록했습니다.
주주에게 8억 2,300만 달러를 환원했으며, 2025년 가이던스 개선을 통해 비용 절감 이니셔티브를 지속하고 있습니다.

watchItems.text: 2026년 초 나타샤 빌조엔 신임 CEO 취임 이후의 경영 전략 변화와 비용 절감 이니셔티브의 지속 가능성을 확인할 필요가 있습니다.

evidence.sourceTextDigest: EX-99.1 2 newmontq32025earningsrelea.htm EX-99.1 Document NYSE: NEM, ASX: NEM, PNGX: NEM Exhibit 99.1 Newmont Reports Third Quarter 2025 Results and Improves 2025 Cost & Capital Guidance DENVER, October 23, 2025 – Newmont Corporation (NYSE: NEM, ASX: NEM, PNGX: NEM) (Newmont or the Company) today announced third quarter 2025 results and declared a dividend of $0.25 1 per share. "Newmont delivered a robust third quarter performance, producing approximately 1.4 million attributable gold ounces and generating a third-quarter record of $1.6 billion in free cash flow, marking the fourth consecutive quarter with over $1 billion in free cash flow," said Tom Palmer, Newmont's Chief Executive Officer. "We are making significant progress on the cost savings initiatives announced at the beginning of the year, enabling us to meaningfully improve our 2025 guidance   Normalized numeric aliases: 1.4 million = 140만 달러; $1.6 billion = 16억 달러; $1 billion = 10억 달러; $0.25 = 0.25달러; $1.6 = 1.6달러; $1 = 1달러.

taining our outlook for production and unit costs in a rising gold price environment. As I prepare to retire at year-end, I am confident that Newmont is well positioned to continue delivering strong performance under Natascha Viljoen's leadership, as she assumes the role of Chief Executive Officer at the beginning of 2026." Q3 2025 Results ▪ Reported Net Income of $1.8 billion, Adjusted Net Income (ANI) 2 of $1.9 billion or $1.71 per diluted share, and Adjusted EBITDA 2 of $3.3 billion ▪ Produced 1.4 million gold ounces, as well as 35 thousand tonnes of copper, primarily from Newmont's core managed operations ▪ Improved Newmont's 2025 cost and capital guidance through continued progress on cost savings initiatives and a shift in the timing of capital spend; remain on   Normalized numeric aliases: $1.8 billion = 18억 달러; $1.9 billion = 19억 달러; $3.3 billion = 33억 달러; 1.4 million = 140만 달러; $640 million = 6억 4,000만 달러; $1.8 = 1.8달러; $1.9 = 1.9달러; $1.71 = 1.71달러; $640 = 640달러; $3.3 = 3.3달러.

asset and equity sales, including the sale of shares in Orla Mining and Discovery Silver, the receipt of the Akyem contingent payment, and the sale of the Coffee project 4 ▪ In 2025, received more than $3.5 billion in net cash proceeds from announced transactions, including approximately $2.6 billion from divested assets and nearly $900 million from the sale of equity shares 5 ▪ Generated $2.3 billion of cash from operating activities, net of unfavorable working capital impacts of $286 million, primarily driven by the timing of cash collections; reported third-quarter record Free Cash Flow 2 of $1.6 billion ▪ Returned $823 million of capital to shareholders through share repurchases and div  Normalized numeric aliases: $3.5 billion = 35억 달러; $2.6 billion = 26억 달러; $900 million = 9억 달러; $2.3 billion = 23억 달러; $286 million = 2억 8,600만 달러; $1.6 billion = 16억 달러; $823 million = 8억 2,300만 달러; $3.5 = 3.5달러; $900 = 900달러; $0.25 = 0.25달러; $2.3 = 2.3달러; $286 = 286달러; $1.6 = 1.6달러; $823 = 823달러.

trades of common stock repurchases of $3.3 billion; $2.7 billion remains under the previously authorized programs of $6.0 billion 7 ▪ Reduced debt by $2 billion through the completion of a successful debt tender offer, ending the quarter in a near-zero net debt position with $5.6 billion of cash and $9.6 billion in total liquidity 8 ▪ Received credit rating upgrade by Moody's to A3 with a stable outlook, supported by Newmont's improved credit profile, strengthened balance sheet, excellent liquidity position, and prudent financial management ▪ Expect to declare commercial production at the Ahafo North project in Ghana by end of day on October 23, 2025, adding profitable gold production over an initial 13-year mine life 1 Newmont's  Normalized numeric aliases: $3.3 billion = 33억 달러; $2.7 billion = 27억 달러; $6.0 billion = 60억 달러; $2 billion = 20억 달러; $5.6 billion = 56억 달러; $9.6 billion = 96억 달러; $3.3 = 3.3달러; $2.7 = 2.7달러; $2 = 2달러; $6.0 = 6.0달러; $5.6 = 5.6달러; $9.6 = 9.6달러; $0.25 = 0.25달러.

generation.costPolicy: Provider chain: Spark OAuth/free first, Gemini free second, approved DeepSeek v4 flash paid last on quota only.
